claims.summary: Dynamic noise should remain bounded, finite, continuous at knees, and responsive to gradient and pressure.
claims.disposition: verify dynamic-noise, pressure-room, and continuity tests

claims.summary: The current dynamic-noise helper is evidence-only and is not wired into the active ESN step.
claims.disposition: verify explicit unwired comments and read-only review authority

claims.summary: Wiring dynamic noise, damping, rho, or an entropy ceiling into the live ESN would alter regulation.
claims.disposition: gate behind exact Mike/operator Tier 5 approval with replay and abort criteria
claims.authority: No live exploration-noise, rho, entropy-threshold, pressure, fill, PI, or controller change is authorized.
